modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by an end user through a self-service form submission and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in symptom-first manner and use a formal and professional tone. The writing should have very limited detail and show limited technical understanding. There should be a few minor typos and some uncertain technical terminology.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Missing files from OneDrive account on computer

full_description_text:  
I am experiencing an issue where my files have disappeared from their folders in OneDrive. While I can see them on the OneDrive website, they are not appearing on my computer. This is causing confusion and I am unsure why this is happening.
short_description: Missing files from OneDrive account on computer
description: I am experiencing an issue where my files have disappeared from their folders in OneDrive. While I can see them on the OneDrive website, they are not appearing on my computer. This is causing confusion and I am unsure why this is happening.
